leadText: The Eject Pack (Japanese: だっしゅつパック Break-Out Pack) is a type of consumable held item introduced in Generation VIII. It switches out the holder if any of its stats are lowered.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If any of the holder's stats is lowered (including by the use of its own moves such as Overheat ), the Eject Pack is consumed and the holder automatically switches out . If the holder is switched in while Sticky Web is set on its side of the field, it will immediately switch out again. Because only one Pokémon can switch out per move, a Pokémon's held Eject Pack will not activate if it is hit by Parting Shot . If multiple Pokémon's held Eject Buttons and Eject Packs would activate at once, only the held item of the fastest among these Pokémon will activate.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh Battle Tower (20 BP ) Sw Sh CT Snowslide Slope S V Delibird Presents ( Levincia Branch, after earning 4 Gym Badges )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder's stats are lowered, it will be switched out of battle. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder's stats are lowered, it will be switched out of battle.
